title: Google TPU 8t and 8i is here..
summary: Google released TPU 8t for training and TPU 8i for inference, specialized ASIC chips deployed via the Virgo Network. The video compares these ASICs to general-purpose GPUs and analyzes scaling strategies' impact on token economics and LLM serving at scale.
